events.summary: Three Nations, One Table: North American Agriculture under USMCA Join the Americas Program for a conference on USMCA and the future of North American food and agriculture. events.title: Launch of the French-Brazilian AURELA Research Project
events.summary: AURELA is a four-year Franco-Brazilian research program funded by CAPES-COFECUB and bringing together six universities in Brazil and France. The program explores key challenges in EU–Latin America relations, focusing on sustainability, security and emerging technologies, and democratic governance.
